note: Ticker -> SEC EDGAR CIK for the sector-desk core names, used by fetch-feeds.js to pull each company's material filings (8-K deals/dilution, S-3/424B offerings, 13D/G, Form 4). CIKs verified against EDGAR's company_tickers.json on 2026-06-11; they don't change when a company renames. subGroup: miner-ai = bitcoin miner pivoting power to AI/HPC, ai-cloud = AI cloud/GPU compute pure-play, ai-spec = speculative AI small-cap. core=true are Jad's named positions (dossiers first); peers ride along for catalysts + rotation. To add a name: look it up in https://www.sec.gov/files/company_tickers.json and paste its 10-digit zero-padded CIK.
